title: Pyth unveils continuous pricing indexes for US stocks and commodities
summary: Coinbase, Kraken and dYdX are adopting Pyth's new indexes, which provide continuous pricing for US stocks, gold and oil outside market hours.

title: Bitcoin price may slide toward $30K as institutions dump 450% of daily BTC supply
summary: Bitcoin’s institutional support weakened as ETFs and companies dumped almost 2,000 BTC daily and Strategy’s buying lost momentum.

title: Stocks Waver as US-Iran Tensions Offset CPI Relief: Markets Wrap
summary: A relatively tame inflation report brought a degree of relief to Wall Street, but left stocks wavering amid heightened geopolitical tensions that are keeping energy costs elevated and threatening further price pressures.

title: El Niño Emerges in Pacific, Raising Heat and Crop Risks
summary: El Niño has formed across the equatorial Pacific, setting the stage for months of droughts, floods and temperature fluctuations that will threaten communities worldwide along with agriculture and energy.

title: Delaware Advances Bill to Ban ‘Predatory’ Bitcoin ATMs
summary: Lawmakers have advanced legislation that would ban all cryptocurrency kiosks statewide, with physical removal mandated within 90 days.

title: Solana Sponsors the World Series of Poker, Enabling Crypto Entry Fees and Payouts
summary: Players can now enter World Series of Poker tournaments with SOL or stablecoins, with Solana branding to be prominent at events.

title: Benchmark says Securitize ‘poised to be a positive outlier,’ sets $16 target as NYSE listing nears

title: CFTC unveils sweeping rule proposal for fast-growing prediction markets
summary: The CFTC proposed new rules for burgeoning prediction markets that delineate what bets would be allowed under federal law.
